I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.
Seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds.
Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you.
Love the Lord your God with all your heart and love your neighbor as yourself.
If you love me, keep my commands.
Do to others as you would have them do to you.
I have come that they may have life, and have it to the full.
With God all things are possible.
I am the bread of life. Whoever comes to me will never go hungry.
I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness.
I am the resurrection and the life.
I am the vine; you are the branches. Apart from me you can do nothing.
Do not judge, or you too will be judged.
No one can serve two masters.
Do not worry about your life.
Whoever wants to be first must be servant of all.
Unless you become like little children, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven.
Where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one’s life for one’s friends.
Those who exalt themselves will be humbled, and those who humble themselves will be exalted.
Come, follow me.
Whatever you ask for in prayer, believe that you have received it.
Forgive others so that your Father may forgive you.
Do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself.
Blessed are those who are persecuted because of righteousness.
Love your enemies and pray for those who persecute you.
In everything, do to others what you would have them do to you.
Take heart! I have overcome the world.
My yoke is easy and my burden is light.
Before Abraham was born, I am.
I and the Father are one.
Anyone who has seen me has seen the Father.
All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.
The Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins.
The Son of Man is Lord of the Sabbath.
My kingdom is not of this world, but now my kingdom is from another place.
Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will never pass away.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you. I do not give to you as the world gives.
I am not alone, for my Father is with me.
Whoever believes in me will live, even though they die.
If you remain in me and I in you, you will bear much fruit; apart from me you can do nothing.
No one takes my life from me, but I lay it down of my own accord.
Everything that the Father gives me will come to me, and whoever comes to me I will never drive away.
I am the living bread that came down from heaven. Whoever eats this bread will live forever.
If anyone thirsts, let him come to me and drink. Whoever believes in me, rivers of living water will flow from within them.
If the Son sets you free, you will be free indeed.
You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.
The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy; I have come that they may have life, and have it more abundantly.
Whoever wants to save their life will lose it, but whoever loses their life for me will find it.
What good will it be for someone to gain the whole world, yet forfeit their soul?
Everyone who exalts himself will be humbled, and he who humbles himself will be exalted.
Watch and pray so that you will not fall into temptation. The spirit is willing, but the flesh is weak.
